/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG  -shared -Wl,-soname,libouster_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libouster_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/ouster_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/ouster_msgs/msg/detail/packet_msg__functions.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/foxy/lib: /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl
